meta.title: Property Management - Tidal Realty Services
meta.description: Professional property management in Houston. Flat $99/month fee. 20+ years experience managing single-family homes, condos, and apartment complexes.

hero.description: Single-family homes, condos, and apartment complexes, managed with your profits in mind and a flat-rate fee structure that keeps your bottom line intact.

columns.title: Flat Rate Promise
columns.description: No percentage-based fees eating your returns. Just $99/month per door. Predictable, transparent, always.

columns.title: Bottom Line Focus
columns.description: Every decision we make is filtered through one question: does this protect the owner's investment?

columns.title: Personal Accountability
columns.description: Large enough to handle any complex. Accessible enough to answer the phone.

services.label: Full-Service Management
services.title: We Do It All So You Don't Have To.

items.title: Property Assessment
items.description: Inspect, advise, and prepare your property to attract quality tenants fast

items.title: Marketing & Advertising
items.description: MLS, HAR, Greensheet, signage and data-driven rental pricing

items.title: Tenant Screening
items.description: Full background checks on every applicant, no exceptions

items.title: Rent Collection
items.description: Structured collection with clear due dates protecting your cash flow

items.title: Eviction Management
items.description: Swift, professional action when needed, always on the owner's side

items.title: HOA & Bill Payment
items.description: We handle mortgage, insurance, HOA and tax payments on your behalf

items.title: Monthly Reporting
items.description: Clean income/expense reports monthly plus full year-end accounting

multiUnit.label: Multi-Unit & Apartment Management
multiUnit.title: From Boutique Condos to Large Communities. We've Seen It All.
multiUnit.description: Our occupancy rates consistently exceed industry averages because we understand that your residents are your income. We attract the best tenants, keep them longer, and handle every aspect of daily operations without the 'slum lord' reputation that comes from cutting corners.

features.title: Flat Rate Pricing
features.description: Predictable costs that never eat into your returns

features.title: Expert Resources
features.description: CPAs, maintenance technicians, and legal support

features.title: Resident Retention
features.description: Quality residents kept longer = stable, predictable income

cta.description: Let's talk about how we can manage your property and maximize your returns.
